reason: Check that component-level edits remain idiomatic and do not introduce avoidable prop or rendering churn.
Check hook dependency, cleanup, and state/effect changes against repository conventions.
Check that state/effect warnings were resolved by preserving source-of-truth ownership rather than adding sync effects.
Check required verification commands and residual risk reporting for frontend cleanup work.
Check that repeated mechanical cleanups use a consistent pattern and avoid divergent one-off edits.
